description: A structural analysis engineer needs planform geometry data for the eCRM-001 research wing to parameterize a thin-shell finite element model. Using OpenVSP's Degen Geom (Degenerate Geometry) analysis tool (Analysis > Degen Geom), run the analysis and export the results to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_degengeom.csv. Then, parse the CSV to extract the following wing planform metrics for the main Wing component: (1) total projected wingspan, (2) total projected planform area, (3) mean aerodynamic chord (MAC), and (4) aspect ratio. Write these four values in a structured report to /home/ga/Desktop/degengeom_report.txt. The eCRM-001 model is already open at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. All values must be in metric units.
